```{r Master Analyses Code | Functions and Specs}
    cluster_scores[c, ] <- colSums(scores[idx, , drop = FALSE])
  }
  
  meat <- crossprod(cluster_scores)
  vcov_model <- vcov(model)
  
  adj <- n_clusters / (n_clusters - 1) *
    (n - 1) / (n - p * k_minus_1)
  
  vcov_model %*% meat %*% vcov_model * adj
}

#### Multinomial: optional diagnostics for clustering ####
verify_clustered_ses <- function(model, cluster_var, data) {
  
  se_standard <- sqrt(diag(vcov(model)))
  vcov_robust <- vcov_cluster_multinom(model, cluster = data[[cluster_var]])
  se_clustered <- sqrt(diag(vcov_robust))
  
  se_comparison <- data.frame(
    Parameter    = names(se_standard),
    Standard_SE  = se_standard,
    Clustered_SE = se_clustered,
    Ratio        = se_clustered / se_standard
  )
  
  cat("\n==============================\n")
  cat("CLUSTERED SE DIAGNOSTICS\n")
  cat("==============================\n\n")
  cat("Mean ratio:", sprintf("%.3f", mean(se_comparison$Ratio)), "\n")
  cat("Min ratio:", sprintf("%.3f", min(se_comparison$Ratio)), "\n")
  cat("Max ratio:", sprintf("%.3f", max(se_comparison$Ratio)), "\n\n")
  
  list(
    se_comparison = se_comparison,
    vcov_robust   = vcov_robust
  )
}

#### Multinomial: fit function (clustered or unclustered) ####
fit_multinom_generic <- function(
  fml,
  data,
  cluster_var = "state",
  clustered   = TRUE,
  verify      = FALSE
) {
  
  data <- data %>%
    filter(!is.na(!!rlang::sym(cluster_var)))
  
  m <- multinom(fml, data = data, trace = FALSE, model = TRUE)
  
  if (clustered) {
    if (verify) {
      ver <- verify_clustered_ses(m, cluster_var, data)
      vc <- ver$vcov_robust
    } else {
      vc <- vcov_cluster_multinom(m, cluster = data[[cluster_var]])
    }
  } else {
    vc <- vcov(m)
  }
  
  coefs <- coef(m)
  if (!is.matrix(coefs)) {
    coefs <- matrix(coefs, nrow = 1)
    rownames(coefs) <- levels(m$y)[2]
  }
  
  outcome_levels  <- rownames(coefs)
  predictor_names <- colnames(coefs)
  n_pred          <- length(predictor_names)
  
  se_vec <- sqrt(diag(vc))
  
  results_list <- list()
  
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(coefs))) {
    outcome <- outcome_levels[i]
    idx_start <- (i - 1) * n_pred + 1
    idx_end   <- i * n_pred
    
    results_list[[outcome]] <- data.frame(
      y.level    = outcome,
      term       = predictor_names,
      estimate   = coefs[i, ],
      std.error  = se_vec[idx_start:idx_end],
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ) %>%
      mutate(
        RRR   = exp(estimate),
        SE    = std.error,
        z     = estimate / std.error,
        p     = 2 * pnorm(abs(z), lower.tail = FALSE),
        stars = sig_stars(p)
      ) %>%
      dplyr::select(y.level, term, RRR, SE, stars)
  }
  
  bind_rows(results_list)
}

#### Format logistic results: one row per term, one column per model ####
format_results_wide_logit <- function(results_list) {
  
  processed <- purrr::imap(results_list, function(df, model_name) {
    df %>%
      mutate(
        Term     = var_labels[term] %||% term,
        or_value  = sprintf("%.2f\n(%.2f)", OR, SE),
        star_val  = stars
      ) %>%
      dplyr::select(term, Term, or_value, star_val) %>%
      rename(
        !!model_name           := or_value,
        !!paste0(model_name,
                 "_stars")     := star_val
      )
  })
  
  all_terms <- data.frame(
    term = c("(Intercept)", var_order),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ) %>%
    mutate(Term = var_labels[term] %||% term)
  
  result_df <- all_terms
  
  for (i in seq_along(processed)) {
    result_df <- result_df %>%
      full_join(
        processed[[i]] %>%
          dplyr::select(term, everything(), -Term),
        by = "term"
      )
  }
  
  result_df %>%
    mutate(
      order_index = ifelse(term == "(Intercept)", 0,
                           match(term, var_order))
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(order_index)) %>%
    arrange(order_index) %>%
    dplyr::select(-order_index, -term)
}

#### Format multinomial results: stacked by outcome, cc_no_permit first ####
format_results_wide_multinom <- function(results_list) {
  
  formatted <- imap(results_list, function(df, model_name) {
    df %>%
      mutate(
        Term     = var_labels[term] %||% term,
        rrr_disp  = sprintf("%.2f\n(%.2f)", RRR, SE),
        star_disp = stars
      ) %>%
      dplyr::select(y.level, term, Term, rrr_disp, star_disp) %>%
      rename(
        !!model_name           := rrr_disp,
        !!paste0(model_name,
                 "_stars")     := star_disp
      )
  })
  
  all_terms <- data.frame(
    term = c("(Intercept)", var_order),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ) %>%
    mutate(Term = var_labels[term] %||% term)
  
  all_outcomes <- unique(formatted[[1]]$y.level)
  wide_by_outcome <- list()
  
  for (outcome in all_outcomes) {
    
    outcome_data <- all_terms
    
    for (i in seq_along(formatted)) {
      model_data <- formatted[[i]] %>%
        filter(y.level == outcome) %>%
        dplyr::select(-y.level, -Term)
      
      outcome_data <- outcome_data %>%
        left_join(model_data, by = "term")
    }
    
    outcome_data <- outcome_data %>%
      mutate(
        is_cc = ifelse(term == "cc_no_permit", 0, 1),
        order_index = ifelse(
          term == "cc_no_permit",
          0,
          match(term, var_order)
        )
      ) %>%
      arrange(is_cc, order_index) %>%
      dplyr::select(-is_cc, -order_index) %>%
      mutate(y.level = outcome) %>%
      dplyr::select(y.level, Term, everything(), -term)
    
    wide_by_outcome[[outcome]] <- outcome_data
  }
  
  bind_rows(wide_by_outcome)
}

#### Word export for logistic models ####
run_logit_models_to_word <- function(
  dv,
  data,
  weight_var = NULL,
  file_name
) {
  
  formulas <- build_formulas(dv)
  
  weight_status <- if (!is.null(weight_var)) "Weighted" else "Unweighted"
  message("\n", paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""))
  message(weight_status, " analysis with state clustering for DV: ", dv)
  message(paste(rep("=", 60), collapse = ""), "\n")
  
  results_list <- imap(
    formulas,
    function(fml, nm) {
      message("Fitting model: ", nm)
      fit_survey_clustered(
        fml,
        df         = data,
        weight_var = weight_var
      )
    }
  )
  
  final_table <- format_results_wide_logit(results_list)
  ft <- flextable(final_table)
  
  # Remove header text for stars columns
  star_cols <- grep("_stars$", names(final_table))
  for (col_idx in star_cols) {
    ft <- set_header_labels(
      ft,
      values = setNames("", names(final_table)[col_idx])
    )
  }
  
    # ---- FIRST autofit for row height only ----
  ft <- autofit(ft)

  # ---- THEN apply column widths (autofit can no longer override them) ----

  ncols <- ncol(final_table)

  # 1) Term column
  ft <- width(ft, j = 1, width = 1.4)

  # 2) Default width for all other model OR columns
  ft <- width(ft, j = 2:ncols, width = 0.85)

  # 3) Odd-numbered columns (3,5,7,...) get narrow width
  #    these correspond to OR(SE) columns
  odd_cols <- seq(3, min(18, ncols), by = 2)
  ft <- width(ft, j = odd_cols, width = 0.35)

  # ---- Now alignment / fonts ----
  ft <- bold(ft, part = "header")
  ft <- align(ft, align = "center", part = "header")
  ft <- align(ft, j = 1, align = "left", part = "body")
  ft <- align(ft, j = -1, align = "center", part = "body")

  # Set font defaults
  ft <- font(ft, fontname = "Times New Roman", part = "all")
  ft <- fontsize(ft, size = 10, part = "all")
  
  doc <- read_docx()
  doc <- body_add_par(
    doc,
    glue("{weight_status} clustered logit models: {dv}"),
    style = "heading 1"
  )
  doc <- body_add_flextable(doc, ft)
  
  print(doc, target = file_name)
  message("✓ Wrote: ", file_name)
}

#### Word export for multinomial models ####
run_multinom_models_to_word <- function(
  dv,
  data,
  file_name,
  clustered = TRUE,
  verify_ses = FALSE
) {
  
  formulas <- build_formulas(dv)
  
  results_list <- imap(
    formulas,
    function(fml, nm) {
      message("Fitting: ", nm)
      fit_multinom_generic(
        fml,
        data       = data,
        clustered  = clustered,
        verify     = verify_ses
      )
    }
  )
  
  final_table <- format_results_wide_multinom(results_list)
  ft <- flextable(final_table)
  
  # Remove header text for stars columns
  star_cols <- grep("_stars$", names(final_table))
  for (col_idx in star_cols) {
    ft <- set_header_labels(
      ft,
      values = setNames("", names(final_table)[col_idx])
    )
  }
  
    # ---- Apply human-readable model titles to estimate columns ----
  est_cols <- which(!grepl("_stars$", names(final_table)) &
                     !names(final_table) %in% c("y.level", "Term"))

  # Sanity check: number of estimate columns should match model_titles
  stopifnot(length(est_cols) == length(model_titles))

  ft <- set_header_labels(
    ft,
    values = setNames(model_titles, names(final_table)[est_cols])
  )
  
  # ---- ONE autofit pass only ----
  ft <- autofit(ft)
  
  # ---- Explicit column widths (override autofit) ----
  ncols <- ncol(final_table)
  
  # Outcome label column
  ft <- width(ft, j = 1, width = 1.0)
  
  # Term column
  ft <- width(ft, j = 2, width = 1.4)
  
  # Default width for remaining columns
  if (ncols >= 3) {
    ft <- width(ft, j = 3:ncols, width = 0.85)
  }
  
  # Narrow estimate columns (3, 5, 7, ...)
  odd_cols <- seq(4, ncols, by = 2)
  ft <- width(ft, j = odd_cols, width = 0.35)
  
  # ---- Styling ----
  ft <- bold(ft, part = "header")
  ft <- align(ft, align = "center", part = "header")
  ft <- align(ft, j = 1:2, align = "left",  part = "body")
  ft <- align(ft, j = -(1:2), align = "center", part = "body")
  
  # Font defaults
  ft <- font(ft, fontname = "Times New Roman", part = "all")
  ft <- fontsize(ft, size = 10, part = "all")
  
  doc <- read_docx()
  se_type <- if (clustered) "State-clustered" else "Standard (unclustered)"
  
  doc <- body_add_par(
    doc,
    glue("Multinomial logit with {se_type} SEs: {dv}"),
    style = "heading 1"
  )
  doc <- body_add_par(
    doc,
    glue("Baseline category: {levels(data[[dv]])[1]}"),
    style = "Normal"
  )
  doc <- body_add_flextable(doc, ft)
  
  print(doc, target = file_name)
  message("✓ Wrote Word document: ", file_name)
}
```

```{r Master Analyses Code | Create Main Model Documents}
#### Usage: logistic models (weighted + unweighted) ####
run_logit_models_to_word(
  dv         = "gun_own",
  data       = dat_all_processed,
  weight_var = "wgtpi",
  file_name  = "output/clustered_models_gun_own_WEIGHTED.docx"
)

run_logit_models_to_word(
  dv         = "gun_own",
  data       = dat_all_processed,
  weight_var = NULL,
  file_name  = "output/clustered_models_gun_own_UNWEIGHTED.docx"
)

run_logit_models_to_word(
  dv         = "purchase_plan",
  data       = dat_NONgunowners_processed,
  weight_var = NULL,
  file_name  = "output/clustered_models_purchase_plan_UNWEIGHTED_non-owners.docx"
)

run_logit_models_to_word(
  dv         = "purchase_plan",
  data       = dat_gunowners_processed,
  weight_var = NULL,
  file_name  = "output/clustered_models_purchase_plan_UNWEIGHTED_owners.docx"
)

run_logit_models_to_word(
  dv         = "gun_home",
  data       = dat_all_processed,
  weight_var = "wgtpi",
  file_name  = "output/clustered_models_gun_home_WEIGHTED.docx"
)

run_logit_models_to_word(
  dv         = "gun_home",
  data       = dat_all_processed,
  weight_var = NULL,
  file_name  = "output/clustered_models_gun_home_UNWEIGHTED.docx"
)

#### Usage: logistic models for partial samples (unweighted) ####
run_logit_models_to_word(
  dv         = "carry",
  data       = dat_gunowners_processed,
  weight_var = NULL,
  file_name  = "output/clustered_models_carry_UNWEIGHTED.docx"
)

run_logit_models_to_word(
  dv         = "open_carry",
  data       = dat_gunowners_processed,
  weight_var = NULL,
  file_name  = "output/clustered_models_open_carry_UNWEIGHTED.docx"
)

run_logit_models_to_word(
  dv         = "carry",
  data       = dat_gunowners_processed_nomin,
  weight_var = NULL,
  file_name  = "output/clustered_models_carry_UNWEIGHTED_nomin.docx"
)

run_logit_models_to_word(
  dv         = "open_carry",
  data       = dat_gunowners_processed_nomin,
  weight_var = NULL,
  file_name  = "output/clustered_models_open_carry_UNWEIGHTED_nomin.docx"
)

#### Usage: multinomial models ####

## Gun type, all respondents (clustered)
run_multinom_models_to_word(
  dv         = "gun_type_cat",
  data       = dat_all_processed,
  file_name  = "output/models_gun_type_multinomial_CLUSTERED.docx",
  clustered  = TRUE,
  verify_ses = FALSE
)

## Gun type, non-gun-owners (clustered)
run_multinom_models_to_word(
  dv         = "gun_type_cat",
  data       = dat_NONgunowners_processed,
  file_name  = "output/models_gun_type_multinomial_CLUSTERED_non-owners.docx",
  clustered  = TRUE,
  verify_ses = FALSE
)

## Gun type, all respondents (unclustered)
run_multinom_models_to_word(
  dv         = "gun_type_cat",
  data       = dat_all_processed,
  file_name  = "output/models_gun_type_multinomial_UNCLUSTERED.docx",
  clustered  = FALSE,
  verify_ses = FALSE
)

## Carry frequency, gun owners (clustered)
run_multinom_models_to_word(
  dv         = "carry_freq_cat",
  data       = dat_gunowners_processed,
  file_name  = "output/models_carry_freq_multinomial_CLUSTERED.docx",
  clustered  = TRUE,
  verify_ses = FALSE
)

## Carry frequency, gun owners, no small-N states (clustered)
run_multinom_models_to_word(
  dv         = "carry_freq_cat",
  data       = dat_gunowners_processed_nomin,
  file_name  = "output/models_carry_freq_multinomial_CLUSTERED_nomin.docx",
  clustered  = TRUE,
  verify_ses = FALSE
)

## Carry type, gun owners (clustered)
run_multinom_models_to_word(
  dv         = "carry_type_cat",
  data       = dat_gunowners_processed,
  file_name  = "output/models_carry_type_multinomial_CLUSTERED.docx",
  clustered  = TRUE,
  verify_ses = FALSE
)

## Carry type, gun owners, no small-N states (clustered)
run_multinom_models_to_word(
  dv         = "carry_type_cat",
  data       = dat_gunowners_processed_nomin,
  file_name  = "output/models_carry_type_multinomial_CLUSTERED_nomin.docx",
  clustered  = TRUE,
  verify_ses = FALSE
)

#### Play Lindsey Buckingham saying "organic" when everything is done ####
play(load.wave("Organic.wav"))
```

```{r Model Doc Creation | Purchase Plan | All | Controlling for Gun Ownership}
# Separate chunk because we're changing the controls
# Use gun ownership variants from shared specs
controls_formula <- paste(control_vars_gunown, collapse = " + ")
var_labels <- var_labels_gunown
var_order <- var_order_gunown

# WEIGHTED purchase_plan
run_logit_models_to_word(
  dv         = "purchase_plan",
  data       = dat_all_processed,
  weight_var = "wgtpi",
  file_name  = "output/clustered_models_purchase_plan_WEIGHTED.docx"
)

# UNWEIGHTED purchase_plan
run_logit_models_to_word(
  dv         = "purchase_plan",
  data       = dat_all_processed,
  weight_var = NULL,
  file_name  = "output/clustered_models_purchase_plan_UNWEIGHTED.docx"
)

# Play Lindsey Buckingham saying "organic" when the document is done
play(load.wave("Organic.wav"))

```

Note on estimation approach for weighted models:
We use survey::svyglm() to correctly handle probability weights (wgtpi) 
with state-level clustering. This approach properly accounts for both the 
sampling weights and within-state correlation. Comparison with glm() + 
vcovCL() shows materially equivalent results, but the survey package is 
preferred as it correctly treats weights as inverse selection probabilities 
rather than frequency weights

***Random intercept models***
Appendix I
```{r Document Creation Setup}
#### SETUP (binary-only workflow) ####
# Note: control_vars, state_sets, model_titles, var_labels, and var_order
# are defined in the "Shared Analysis Specifications" chunk

# Binary DVs we plan to use
allowed_binary_dvs <- c("carry", "open_carry", "gun_home","gun_own","purchase_plan")

# Build controls formula for this chunk
individual_controls <- paste(control_vars, collapse = " + ")

# Cell formatter
fmt_coef_se <- function(est, se) {
  ifelse(is.na(est), "", paste0(sprintf("%.2f", est), "\n(", sprintf("%.2f", se), ")"))
}

#### MODEL & EXPORT HELPERS ####

# Build model formulas for one DV (all with random intercept for state)
build_formulas_for_dv <- function(dv) {
  f0 <- as.formula(glue("{dv} ~ cc_no_permit + (1 | state)"))
  f1 <- as.formula(glue("{dv} ~ cc_no_permit + {individual_controls} + (1 | state)"))
  f_state <- lapply(state_sets, function(ss)
    as.formula(glue("{dv} ~ cc_no_permit + {individual_controls} + {ss} + (1 | state)"))
  )
  c(list(f0, f1), f_state)
}

# Always fit GLMM (binary DV): logit with random intercept for state
fit_me <- function(fml, data) {
  glmer(fml, data = data, family = binomial(),
        control = glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa", optCtrl = list(maxfun = 2e5)))
}

# Tidy GLMM fixed effects; report OR and delta-method SE(OR) ≈ OR * SE(log-odds)
tidy_glmm_or <- function(mod) {
  tt <- broom.mixed::tidy(mod, effects = "fixed", conf.int = FALSE)
  tt <- tt %>%
    mutate(
      OR     = exp(estimate),
      se_or  = OR * std.error,
      p      = if ("p.value" %in% names(.)) p.value else
                 tryCatch(2 * pnorm(-abs(statistic)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
    )
  tt
}

# Assemble the wide table for one DV and return both the table & models
assemble_table_for_dv <- function(dv, data) {
  stopifnot(dv %in% allowed_binary_dvs)
  fmls <- build_formulas_for_dv(dv)

  mods <- map(fmls, fit_me, data = data)
  names(mods) <- model_titles[seq_along(mods)]

  # Tidy each model and reshape into [var, <title>_coef_se, <title>_stars]
  pieces <- imap(mods, function(m, nm) {
    ti <- tidy_glmm_or(m) %>%
      filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
      mutate(
        var     = var_labels[term] %||% term,
        coef_se = fmt_coef_se(OR, se_or),
        stars   = sig_stars(p)
      ) %>%
      dplyr::select(var, coef_se, stars)
    names(ti)[2:3] <- c(paste0(nm, "_coef_se"), paste0(nm, "_stars"))
    ti
  })

  wide <- reduce(pieces, full_join, by = "var")
  wide[is.na(wide)] <- ""

  list(table = wide, models = mods)
}

# Compact flextable builder (expects columns: Variable + repeated pairs)
build_flextable_for_dv <- function(dv, tab2) {

  stopifnot("Variable" %in% names(tab2))

  coef_cols  <- grep("_coef_se$",  names(tab2))
  stars_cols <- grep("_stars$",    names(tab2))
  stopifnot(length(coef_cols) == length(stars_cols))

  cols_no_var  <- names(tab2)[-1]
  lower_labels <- ifelse(
    endsWith(cols_no_var, "_coef_se"),
    "Coef (SE)",
    "Sig."
  )

  groups  <- sub("_(coef_se|stars)$", "", cols_no_var)
  grp_rle <- rle(groups)

  ft <- flextable::flextable(tab2)
  ft <- flextable::theme_booktabs(ft)

  # bottom header row labels
  for (i in seq_along(cols_no_var)) {
    ft <- flextable::set_header_labels(
      ft,
      .labels = stats::setNames(lower_labels[i], cols_no_var[i])
    )
  }
  
  # top header row (model titles)
  ft <- flextable::add_header_row(
    ft,
    values    = c(stringr::str_to_title(dv), grp_rle$values),
    colwidths = c(1, grp_rle$lengths)
  )
  ft <- flextable::merge_h(ft, part = "header")
  
  # remove redundant second header row
  ft <- flextable::delete_rows(ft, i = 2, part = "header")
  
  # blank star-column headers
  star_cols <- grep("_stars$", names(tab2))
  ft <- flextable::set_header_labels(
    ft,
    values = setNames(rep("", length(star_cols)), names(tab2)[star_cols])
  )
  
  # replace top-left header cell
  ft <- flextable::set_header_labels(
    ft,
    values = c(Variable = "Term")
  )

  # ---- Alignment ----
  ft <- flextable::align(ft, j = 1,  align = "left",   part = "all")
  ft <- flextable::align(ft, j = -1, align = "center", part = "all")
  ft <- flextable::valign(ft,        val   = "center", part = "all")

  # ---- FIXED LAYOUT (prevents Word reflow) ----
  ft <- flextable::set_table_properties(
    ft,
    layout = "fixed",
    width  = 1
  )

  # ---- Font defaults ----
  ft <- flextable::font(ft, fontname = "Times New Roman", part = "all")
  ft <- flextable::fontsize(ft, size = 10, part = "all")

  # ---- Padding ----
  ft <- flextable::padding(ft, padding = 2, part = "all")

  # ---- Column widths (MATCH clustered logit + multinomial) ----
  ft <- flextable::width(ft, j = 1,          width = 1.40)  # Variable
  ft <- flextable::width(ft, j = coef_cols,  width = 0.85)  # Coef(SE)
  ft <- flextable::width(ft, j = stars_cols, width = 0.35)  # Sig.

  # ---- Rules ----
  thin <- officer::fp_border(color = "#999999", width = 0.75)
  ft <- flextable::border_remove(ft)
  ft <- flextable::hline_top(ft,    border = thin, part = "header")
  ft <- flextable::hline_bottom(ft, border = thin, part = "header")
  ft <- flextable::hline_bottom(ft, border = thin, part = "body")
  ft <- flextable::bold(ft, part = "header")

  ft
}

```

```{r Model Doc Creation | Gun Ownership | Unweighted}
# Choose DV (from allowed_binary_dvs list)
dv <- "gun_own"

# filter data
matched_data <- make_matched_sample(
  dv = dv,
  data = dat_all_processed,
  individual_controls = individual_controls,
  state_sets = state_sets
)

message("Fitting mixed-effects models for DV = ", dv)
assembled <- assemble_table_for_dv(dv, matched_data)
tab <- assembled$table
mods <- assembled$models

# Rename columns to "Variable", then "<label>_coef_se", "<label>_stars"
#    using the model names we actually have (Base, Ind., set1..)
stopifnot(ncol(tab) > 0)
k <- length(mods)
model_labels <- names(mods)
new_names <- c("Variable", as.vector(rbind(
  paste0(model_labels, "_coef_se"),
  paste0(model_labels, "_stars")
)))
names(tab) <- new_names

# Footer with state variance, N, and AIC (for each model)
gl_list <- lapply(mods, function(m) {
  gl <- tryCatch(broom.mixed::glance(m), error = function(e) NULL)
  vc <- tryCatch(as.data.frame(VarCorr(m)), error = function(e) NULL)
  state_var <- if (!is.null(vc)) vc$vcov[vc$grp == "state"] else NA
  c(
    StateVar = state_var,
    N   = if (!is.null(gl) && !is.null(gl$nobs)) gl$nobs else nobs(m),
    AIC = if (!is.null(gl) && !is.null(gl$AIC))  gl$AIC  else AIC(m)
  )
})
gl_df <- do.call(rbind, gl_list)

footer_rows <- list()
for (stat_name in c("State variance", "AIC")) {
  row <- setNames(as.list(rep("", length(new_names))), new_names)
  row$Variable <- stat_name
  for (j in seq_len(k)) {
    val <- gl_df[j, switch(stat_name,
                           "State variance" = "StateVar",
                           "AIC"            = "AIC")]
    row[[ paste0(model_labels[j], "_coef_se") ]] <-
      if (stat_name == "AIC") formatC(as.numeric(val), format = "f", digits = 1)
      else if (stat_name == "State variance") formatC(as.numeric(val), format = "f", digits = 3)
    row[[ paste0(model_labels[j], "_stars") ]] <- ""
  }
  footer_rows[[length(footer_rows) + 1]] <- as.data.frame(row, check.names = FALSE)
}
footer <- bind_rows(footer_rows)

tab2 <- bind_rows(tab, footer)
tab2[is.na(tab2)] <- ""

# Build flextable & export to Word
ft <- build_flextable_for_dv(dv, tab2)

doc_path <- paste0("output/models_permit_", dv, "_mixed.docx")
doc <- officer::read_docx()
doc <- officer::body_add_par(doc, stringr::str_to_title(dv), style = "heading 1")
doc <- flextable::body_add_flextable(doc, ft)
print(doc, target = doc_path)
message("Wrote: ", doc_path)

# Play Lindsey Buckingham saying "organic" when the document is done
play(load.wave("Organic.wav"))
```

```{r Model Doc Creation | Gun in Home | Unweighted}
# Choose DV (from allowed_binary_dvs list)
dv <- "gun_home"

# filter data
matched_data <- make_matched_sample(
  dv = dv,
  data = dat_all_processed,
  individual_controls = individual_controls,
  state_sets = state_sets
)

message("Fitting mixed-effects models for DV = ", dv)
assembled <- assemble_table_for_dv(dv, matched_data)
tab <- assembled$table
mods <- assembled$models

# Rename columns to "Variable", then "<label>_coef_se", "<label>_stars"
# using the model names we actually have (Base, Ind., set1..)
stopifnot(ncol(tab) > 0)
k <- length(mods)
model_labels <- names(mods)
new_names <- c("Variable", as.vector(rbind(
  paste0(model_labels, "_coef_se"),
  paste0(model_labels, "_stars")
)))
names(tab) <- new_names

# Footer with state variance, N, and AIC (for each model)
gl_list <- lapply(mods, function(m) {
  gl <- tryCatch(broom.mixed::glance(m), error = function(e) NULL)
  vc <- tryCatch(as.data.frame(VarCorr(m)), error = function(e) NULL)
  state_var <- if (!is.null(vc)) vc$vcov[vc$grp == "state"] else NA
  c(
    StateVar = state_var,
    N   = if (!is.null(gl) && !is.null(gl$nobs)) gl$nobs else nobs(m),
    AIC = if (!is.null(gl) && !is.null(gl$AIC))  gl$AIC  else AIC(m)
  )
})
gl_df <- do.call(rbind, gl_list)

footer_rows <- list()
for (stat_name in c("State variance", "AIC")) {
  row <- setNames(as.list(rep("", length(new_names))), new_names)
  row$Variable <- stat_name
  for (j in seq_len(k)) {
    val <- gl_df[j, switch(stat_name,
                           "State variance" = "StateVar",
                           "AIC"            = "AIC")]
    row[[ paste0(model_labels[j], "_coef_se") ]] <-
      if (stat_name == "AIC") formatC(as.numeric(val), format = "f", digits = 1)
      else if (stat_name == "State variance") formatC(as.numeric(val), format = "f", digits = 3)
    row[[ paste0(model_labels[j], "_stars") ]] <- ""
  }
  footer_rows[[length(footer_rows) + 1]] <- as.data.frame(row, check.names = FALSE)
}
footer <- bind_rows(footer_rows)

tab2 <- bind_rows(tab, footer)
tab2[is.na(tab2)] <- ""

# Build flextable & export to Word
ft <- build_flextable_for_dv(dv, tab2)

doc_path <- paste0("output/models_permit_", dv, "_mixed.docx")
doc <- officer::read_docx()
doc <- officer::body_add_par(doc, stringr::str_to_title(dv), style = "heading 1")
doc <- flextable::body_add_flextable(doc, ft)
print(doc, target = doc_path)
message("Wrote: ", doc_path)

# Play Lindsey Buckingham saying "organic" when the document is done
play(load.wave("Organic.wav"))
```

```{r Model Doc Creation | Carry | Unweighted | Gun Owners}
# Choose DV (from allowed_binary_dvs list)
dv <- "carry"

# filter data
matched_data <- make_matched_sample(
  dv = dv,
  data = dat_gunowners_processed,
  individual_controls = individual_controls,
  state_sets = state_sets
)

message("Fitting mixed-effects models for DV = ", dv)
assembled <- assemble_table_for_dv(dv, matched_data)
tab <- assembled$table
mods <- assembled$models

# Rename columns to "Variable", then "<label>_coef_se", "<label>_stars"
# using the model names we actually have (Base, Ind., set1..)
stopifnot(ncol(tab) > 0)
k <- length(mods)
model_labels <- names(mods)
new_names <- c("Variable", as.vector(rbind(
  paste0(model_labels, "_coef_se"),
  paste0(model_labels, "_stars")
)))
names(tab) <- new_names

# Footer with state variance, N, and AIC (for each model)
gl_list <- lapply(mods, function(m) {
  gl <- tryCatch(broom.mixed::glance(m), error = function(e) NULL)
  vc <- tryCatch(as.data.frame(VarCorr(m)), error = function(e) NULL)
  state_var <- if (!is.null(vc)) vc$vcov[vc$grp == "state"] else NA
  c(
    StateVar = state_var,
    N   = if (!is.null(gl) && !is.null(gl$nobs)) gl$nobs else nobs(m),
    AIC = if (!is.null(gl) && !is.null(gl$AIC))  gl$AIC  else AIC(m)
  )
})
gl_df <- do.call(rbind, gl_list)

footer_rows <- list()
for (stat_name in c("State variance", "AIC")) {
  row <- setNames(as.list(rep("", length(new_names))), new_names)
  row$Variable <- stat_name
  for (j in seq_len(k)) {
    val <- gl_df[j, switch(stat_name,
                           "State variance" = "StateVar",
                           "AIC"            = "AIC")]
    row[[ paste0(model_labels[j], "_coef_se") ]] <-
      if (stat_name == "AIC") formatC(as.numeric(val), format = "f", digits = 1)
      else if (stat_name == "State variance") formatC(as.numeric(val), format = "f", digits = 3)
    row[[ paste0(model_labels[j], "_stars") ]] <- ""
  }
  footer_rows[[length(footer_rows) + 1]] <- as.data.frame(row, check.names = FALSE)
}
footer <- bind_rows(footer_rows)

tab2 <- bind_rows(tab, footer)
tab2[is.na(tab2)] <- ""

# Build flextable & export to Word
ft <- build_flextable_for_dv(dv, tab2)

doc_path <- paste0("output/models_permit_", dv, "_mixed.docx")
doc <- officer::read_docx()
doc <- officer::body_add_par(doc, stringr::str_to_title(dv), style = "heading 1")
doc <- flextable::body_add_flextable(doc, ft)
print(doc, target = doc_path)
message("Wrote: ", doc_path)

# Play Lindsey Buckingham saying "organic" when the document is done
play(load.wave("Organic.wav"))
```

```{r Model Doc Creation | Open Carry | Unweighted | Gun Owners}
# Choose DV (from allowed_binary_dvs list)
dv <- "open_carry"

# filter data
matched_data <- make_matched_sample(
  dv = dv,
  data = dat_gunowners_processed,
  individual_controls = individual_controls,
  state_sets = state_sets
)

message("Fitting mixed-effects models for DV = ", dv)
assembled <- assemble_table_for_dv(dv, matched_data)
tab <- assembled$table
mods <- assembled$models

# Rename columns to "Variable", then "<label>_coef_se", "<label>_stars"
# using the model names we actually have (Base, Ind., set1..)
stopifnot(ncol(tab) > 0)
k <- length(mods)
model_labels <- names(mods)
new_names <- c("Variable", as.vector(rbind(
  paste0(model_labels, "_coef_se"),
  paste0(model_labels, "_stars")
)))
names(tab) <- new_names

# Footer with state variance, N, and AIC (for each model)
gl_list <- lapply(mods, function(m) {
  gl <- tryCatch(broom.mixed::glance(m), error = function(e) NULL)
  vc <- tryCatch(as.data.frame(VarCorr(m)), error = function(e) NULL)
  state_var <- if (!is.null(vc)) vc$vcov[vc$grp == "state"] else NA
  c(
    StateVar = state_var,
    N   = if (!is.null(gl) && !is.null(gl$nobs)) gl$nobs else nobs(m),
    AIC = if (!is.null(gl) && !is.null(gl$AIC))  gl$AIC  else AIC(m)
  )
})
gl_df <- do.call(rbind, gl_list)

footer_rows <- list()
for (stat_name in c("State variance", "AIC")) {
  row <- setNames(as.list(rep("", length(new_names))), new_names)
  row$Variable <- stat_name
  for (j in seq_len(k)) {
    val <- gl_df[j, switch(stat_name,
                           "State variance" = "StateVar",
                           "AIC"            = "AIC")]
    row[[ paste0(model_labels[j], "_coef_se") ]] <-
      if (stat_name == "AIC") formatC(as.numeric(val), format = "f", digits = 1)
      else if (stat_name == "State variance") formatC(as.numeric(val), format = "f", digits = 3)
    row[[ paste0(model_labels[j], "_stars") ]] <- ""
  }
  footer_rows[[length(footer_rows) + 1]] <- as.data.frame(row, check.names = FALSE)
}
footer <- bind_rows(footer_rows)

tab2 <- bind_rows(tab, footer)
tab2[is.na(tab2)] <- ""

# Build flextable & export to Word
ft <- build_flextable_for_dv(dv, tab2)

doc_path <- paste0("output/models_permit_", dv, "_mixed.docx")
doc <- officer::read_docx()
doc <- officer::body_add_par(doc, stringr::str_to_title(dv), style = "heading 1")
doc <- flextable::body_add_flextable(doc, ft)
print(doc, target = doc_path)
message("Wrote: ", doc_path)

# Play Lindsey Buckingham saying "organic" when the document is done
play(load.wave("Organic.wav"))
```

```{r Model Doc Creation | Purchase Plan | Unweighted | Controlling for gun ownership}

#### Use gun ownership variants from shared specs ####
individual_controls <- paste(control_vars_gunown, collapse = " + ")
var_labels <- var_labels_gunown

# Choose DV (from allowed_binary_dvs list)
dv <- "purchase_plan"

# filter data
matched_data <- make_matched_sample(
  dv = dv,
  data = dat_all_processed,
  individual_controls = individual_controls,
  state_sets = state_sets
)

message("Fitting mixed-effects models for DV = ", dv)
assembled <- assemble_table_for_dv(dv, matched_data)
tab <- assembled$table
mods <- assembled$models

# 2) Rename columns to "Variable", then "<label>_coef_se", "<label>_stars"
#    using the model names we actually have (Base, Ind., set1..)
stopifnot(ncol(tab) > 0)
k <- length(mods)
model_labels <- names(mods)
new_names <- c("Variable", as.vector(rbind(
  paste0(model_labels, "_coef_se"),
  paste0(model_labels, "_stars")
)))
names(tab) <- new_names

# 3) Footer with state variance, N, and AIC (for each model)
gl_list <- lapply(mods, function(m) {
  gl <- tryCatch(broom.mixed::glance(m), error = function(e) NULL)
  vc <- tryCatch(as.data.frame(VarCorr(m)), error = function(e) NULL)
  state_var <- if (!is.null(vc)) vc$vcov[vc$grp == "state"] else NA
  c(
    StateVar = state_var,
    N   = if (!is.null(gl) && !is.null(gl$nobs)) gl$nobs else nobs(m),
    AIC = if (!is.null(gl) && !is.null(gl$AIC))  gl$AIC  else AIC(m)
  )
})
gl_df <- do.call(rbind, gl_list)

footer_rows <- list()
for (stat_name in c("State variance", "AIC")) {
  row <- setNames(as.list(rep("", length(new_names))), new_names)
  row$Variable <- stat_name
  for (j in seq_len(k)) {
    val <- gl_df[j, switch(stat_name,
                           "State variance" = "StateVar",
                           "AIC"            = "AIC")]
    row[[ paste0(model_labels[j], "_coef_se") ]] <-
      if (stat_name == "AIC") formatC(as.numeric(val), format = "f", digits = 1)
      else if (stat_name == "State variance") formatC(as.numeric(val), format = "f", digits = 3)
    row[[ paste0(model_labels[j], "_stars") ]] <- ""
  }
  footer_rows[[length(footer_rows) + 1]] <- as.data.frame(row, check.names = FALSE)
}
footer <- bind_rows(footer_rows)

tab2 <- bind_rows(tab, footer)
tab2[is.na(tab2)] <- ""

# 4) Build flextable & export to Word
ft <- build_flextable_for_dv(dv, tab2)

doc_path <- paste0("output/models_permit_", dv, "_mixed.docx")
doc <- officer::read_docx()
doc <- officer::body_add_par(doc, stringr::str_to_title(dv), style = "heading 1")
doc <- flextable::body_add_flextable(doc, ft)
print(doc, target = doc_path)
message("Wrote: ", doc_path)

# Play Lindsey Buckingham saying "organic" when the document is done
play(load.wave("Organic.wav"))
```

```{r See a given model}
assembled <- assemble_table_for_dv("gun_own", matched_data)
mods <- assembled$models
names(mods)
# [1] "Base (RI only)" "Ind. controls" "set1" "set2" "set3" "set4" "set5"

# RENAME MODELS FROM NAMES
m1 <- mods[["set4"]]
m2  <- mods[["Ind. controls"]]

summary(m1)        # fixed effects, z, p; random-intercept SD
lme4::fixef(m1)    # fixed effects only
lme4::ranef(m1)    # random effects (BLUPs) by state
lme4::VarCorr(m1)  # random-effects variance/covariance
AIC(m1); nobs(m1)  # fit stats

# ORs for all fixed effects
exp(lme4::fixef(m1))

# 95% CI for ORs (Wald)
coefs <- lme4::fixef(m1)
ses   <- sqrt(diag(vcov(m1)))
OR    <- exp(coefs)
lo    <- exp(coefs - 1.96 * ses)
hi    <- exp(coefs + 1.96 * ses)
cbind(OR, lo, hi)

# fixed effects with OR and an approximate SE(OR)
broom.mixed::tidy(m1, effects = "fixed") |>
  dplyr::mutate(OR = exp(estimate),
                se_or = OR * std.error)

# one-row model summary (AIC, nobs, etc.)
broom.mixed::glance(m1)

# compare model fit
AIC(m1, m2)               # smaller = better (penalized for complexity)
anova(m1, m2, test = "Chisq")  # LR test (nested models)
```
